title: passerina burchellii
intro: Passerina burchellii, also known as the Butterfly Bush or Purple Sage, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Passerina burchellii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
